old_filter_references.text: # Prevent NameError from older filters if old base references v1300_4_prev_filter.
_v1300_4_prev_filter = _v1410_identity_filter if "_v1410_identity_filter" in globals() else (lambda text: text)
# Fixes missing previous-filter variable issues by not relying on v1300_4_prev_filter.
